title: Create idea-tools
description: Operate on collected ideas: get full text by id, find semantic relations, semantic search, manage tags, view tasks, statistics. Read-only except tag mutation.

findings.message: Skill text references hidden prompt layers
findings.evidence: 3. Call MiniMax-M3 chat completions with a system prompt: pick up to 3

goal: Standardise the per-idea operations (lookup, related, search, tag, tasks, stats) as a single skill, so any channel (Telegram bot, agent chat, future web UI) can perform the same actions consistently.
evidence: All eight commands are implemented in scripts/telegram_notes_bot.py and verified locally with 3 synthetic ideas plus 2 backfilled real ones. /tasks, /tags, /source, and /ideas (LLM report) all produce expected output.
